label: Garden Yield & Harvest Load
description: Estimates fresh and preservation yield from the garden based on planting calendar outputs, crop settings, and household/storehouse targets.

requires: gardenLayoutPlanner.outputs.beds?        // optional: bed dimensions and density guidance
storehouseTargets.outputs.annualTargets? // optional: annual crop targets for storehouse

provides: yieldEstimates          // per-crop yield estimates (fresh vs preservation)
harvestLoadByWeek       // weekly or bucketed harvest load for labor/logistics
preservationLoad        // preservation-focused harvest groupings and batch sizes
